reviews.comment:

reviews.comment:
De todas las estaciones de servicio, ésta sin dudas tiene un excelente lugar donde aparcar con el auto en las arboledas, y descansar estirando las piernas o comer algo o solo disfrutar del airecito

(Translated by Google)
Of all the gas stations, this one undoubtedly has an excellent place to park your car in the groves, and rest stretching your legs, have something to eat, or simply enjoy the fresh air.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5216193713226017652/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURkcXVXci13RRAB
